The '''''Corrupter''''' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]], which served as the flagship of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Garreth Holtz]] and the [[Corrupter Task Force]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
Shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], the ''Corrupter'' led the [[Battle of Hospital|attack on a Rebel hospital platform]] full of wounded from the battle, where members of the [[Azzameen family]] were delivering black-market [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] in the [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|transport]] ''[[Vasudra]]''. Although at least two-thirds of the Rebel craft were able to escape, both the platform and the ''Vasudra'' were lost.<ref name="XWA" /> The ''Corrupter'' subsequently led the Imperial [[Imperialization of Azzameen assets|seizure]] of [[Twin Suns Transport Services/Legends|Twin Suns Transport Services]], in association with forces from [[Viraxo Industries]].

''Corrupter'' was charged with finding the [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']] and its task force. However, superior Rebel intelligence allowed the Rebels to monitor and harass the ''Corrupter'' and its support ships. While it struggled to find the Rebel ships, Alliance starfighters decimated several important supply convoys, including a [[Corrupter repair convoy|critical resupply operation]] for the ''Corrupter'' itself. Stranded with engine damage, it was unable to stop the [[Defiance Task Force]] from escaping from the [[Anoat sector/Legends|Anoat sector]].<ref name="XWA" />

Following this failure, Admiral Holtz was assigned [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] patrol duties as punishment. In an effort to curtail piracy, the ''Corrupter'' again encountered Rebel forces. Based on information provided by the [[Hurrim]], the ''Corrupter'' interfered with an alliance between the Rebels and a smuggling group and seized a spaceborne [[Dunari's Rest]] casino belonging to the businessman [[Dunari]].<ref name="XWA" />

The ''Corrupter'' was destroyed in action while attempting to stop a Rebel counterstrike against the Hurrim in the [[Battle of Hurrim Base]], finally ending the vessel's harassment of the Rebels and their allies.<ref name="XWA" />

==Behind the scenes==
This history of the ''Corrupter'' is based on the player fulfilling any optional goals involving this ship.

The player can attempt to destroy the ''Corrupter'' in the [[Battle of Bettel]] (mission 1:6). However, the scenario demands the ship to appear again later. In order for the continuity to be maintained, if the player brings the ''Corrupter''{{'s}} shields down, [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] from [[Avenger Squadron]] appear. They are armed with Concussion missiles and can be difficult to defeat, ensuring therefore the survival of the ''Corrupter''.<ref name="XWA" />
